spec_match.rationale: The guide now shows guarded soft-navigation and interaction-contentful-paint observer setup, navigationType, interactionId, numeric navigationId, and largestInteractionContentfulPaint in both mini-app payloads and code snippets.

interactive.rationale: Each framework tab has route buttons, navigationType controls, qualifying-route, slow-route, URL-only, and no-interaction actions with live observer payload output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now matches its framework-integration promise by covering native feature detection, fallback instrumentation, and ICP-based soft-navigation LCP attribution.

edge_cases.rationale: URL-only and no-interaction actions show no-entry payloads and explain the fallback measurement path.

references.rationale: The page links to ChromeStatus feature 5144837209194496, Chrome final origin-trial documentation, Chrome measurement docs, and WICG Soft Navigations.

design_system.rationale: The page uses CSS variables, accessible tabs and pressed-state buttons, no raw colors, no inline handlers, and no inline style attributes.

summary: The framework guide now demonstrates current observer setup and fallback handling for Vanilla, React, and Vue integrations.
